overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character walking along elevated railway tracks through a gothic city at night. The scene transitions from a covered stone corridor to an open bridge as rain begins to fall, revealing a panoramic view of the industrial cityscape with the full moon visible through storm clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated railway corridor with gothic stone architecture

agents.ego_description: Batman walking steadily through the covered stone corridor along the elevated track

entered.detail: tall stone columns and walls with ornate gothic detailing forming the left side of the corridor
series of arched window openings in the stone wall on the right side
metal railway tracks with grated flooring extending into the distance
tall gothic tower visible in the far distance through the corridor

segments.scene_description: Batman walks along a covered elevated railway corridor flanked by gothic stone architecture. The enclosed space features tall stone columns on the left and arched openings on the right, with metal tracks extending toward a distant spire.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated railway bridge exposed to sky

events.description: rain begins to fall as Batman exits the covered corridor onto the open bridge
full moon becomes visible through the storm clouds, illuminating the scene

agents.ego_description: Batman continues walking along the open bridge as rain begins to fall around him

entered.detail: dark storm clouds covering the night sky
bright full moon partially obscured by clouds
rain particles visible falling through the scene
faint outline of distant buildings becoming visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered corridor, the scene opens to a stormy night sky with rain beginning to fall. The full moon becomes visible through the clouds as Batman continues along the elevated track, with the silhouette of the distant city emerging on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated railway bridge overlooking industrial district

events.description: industrial cityscape with illuminated buildings and smokestacks becomes visible on the left
camera turns slightly left to reveal more of the gothic architecture and cityscape

agents.ego_description: Batman walking along the track while observing the industrial cityscape and passing monorail

notable_agents.action: monorail train passing on adjacent track with illuminated windows moving parallel to Batman

entered.detail: futuristic monorail train with glowing orange windows passing on the left
illuminated signage for the Monarch Theatre visible among the buildings
tall industrial smokestacks emitting smoke in the distance
ornate gothic building facade with detailed stonework passing by on the left

segments.scene_description: The view opens to reveal the full industrial cityscape of Gotham, with a passing monorail train on the left and the illuminated Monarch Theatre sign visible in the distance. Batman continues along the rain-soaked elevated track as the camera turns to showcase the gothic architecture and smokestacks against the stormy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic gothic corridor into a vast, rain-swept industrial cityscape. It begins with Batman walking through a covered elevated railway flanked by heavy stone columns and arched openings, with metal tracks leading toward a distant spire. As he exits the enclosure, the scene opens to a stormy night sky where rain begins to fall and a full moon emerges through the shifting clouds. The view then expands to reveal the full scale of Gotham, passing a monorail train on the left and spotting the illuminated Monarch Theatre sign in the distance. Finally, the camera turns to showcase the rain-soaked tracks against a backdrop of towering gothic architecture and smoking industrial stacks under the dark, turbulent sky.
